name: print-page
description: Print the entire page or Section.

scripts.i18n: npm run i18n-pot && npm run i18n-json && npm run i18n-mo
scripts.make-zip: npm run build && (npm run i18n || node -e "console.log('i18n failed')") && gulp bundle && gulp zip && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const rm = () => { try { fs.rmSync('bundled', { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch (e) { if (e.code === 'EPERM') { setTimeout(rm, 100); } else { throw e; } } }; rm();"

author: Md. Shamim Islam
